name: codeseek-latency-modes-v1
notes: This fixture exists to measure dedicated latency buckets: retrieval-only, deterministic, and LLM-backed.
Run with provider flags for real provider-backed LLM latency, for example: --provider groq --api-key-env GROQ_API_KEY.
Without provider flags, the LLM case still verifies llm routing but will not measure upstream provider latency.

cases.query: walk me through backend request orchestration flow
compare source display filtering and reasoning-source assembly tradeoffs in this backend
